outline.title: AI Token Gateway
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the unified AI API gateway platform and partnership opportunity for providers.

outline.title: The Problem We Solve
outline.summary: Market fragmentation crisis: developers juggle multiple API keys, inconsistent billing, and high complexity. TokenGateway provides a unified solution.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What is TokenGateway?
outline.summary: Core value proposition: consolidates access, simplifies billing, enables analytics, ensures security, and scales efficiently across all AI providers.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Market Opportunity
outline.summary: 150% YoY market growth, $50B+ annual AI API spending, only 5-10% using multi-provider solutions. $40B+ untapped market opportunity.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Revenue Model for Providers
outline.summary: Direct revenue increase through new customer acquisition, increased usage per customer, and reduced churn. Year 1 impact: $20M-$90M per provider.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Partnership Model
outline.summary: 15% commission on transactions, providers receive 85% of token value. Includes API integration, co-marketing, and 99.9% SLA support.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Customer Segments We Unlock
outline.summary: Four new revenue streams: cost-conscious startups, enterprise teams, AI agencies, and emerging markets. Total addressable market: $5B+.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Competitive Advantages
outline.summary: Multi-provider support, prepaid tokens, 30% volume discounts, advanced analytics, hard cost control, and enterprise-grade security.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Risk Mitigation
outline.summary: Addresses concerns about cannibalization, infrastructure reliability, fraud prevention, and data privacy with concrete solutions and certifications.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Success Metrics
outline.summary: Transparent measurement of partnership success through new customer acquisition, revenue growth, customer retention, and quarterly business reviews.

outline.title: Implementation Timeline
outline.summary: 12-month partnership roadmap: Month 1 integration, Month 2 beta launch, Month 3 full launch, Months 4-12 growth and optimization.

outline.title: 5-Year Financial Projections
outline.summary: Provider revenue grows from $8.5M Year 1 to $510M Year 5. Cumulative 5-year provider revenue: $884M across all providers.

outline.title: Early Results & Case Study
outline.summary: Beta partner achieved $750K monthly revenue, 2,000 new customers, 2.5x higher token consumption, 95% uptime, and 98% satisfaction.

outline.title: Competitive Landscape
outline.summary: TokenGateway differentiates through true multi-provider support, prepaid tokens, enterprise features, provider-friendly revenue share, and superior developer experience.
